title: Crossbow & Bow Optimizer
description: Handles client-side Bow & Crossbow handling, keeping reload and charge behavior smooth, responsive, and unaffected by server-side slowdowns
body:
# Crossbow & Bow Optimizer

Make bows and crossbows feel sharper, cleaner, and more responsive.

Crossbow & Bow Optimizer is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod, that improves ranged weapon feel with cleaner local feedback, smoother charge handling, and more reliable shot responsiveness under latency.

It is built for players who want bow and crossbow gameplay to feel crisp instead of delayed, noisy, or inconsistent.

![Before vs After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ba64502bb1b081949e25012e2d955a9478c6af.png)

## Why Players Use It

- Makes bow and crossbow feedback feel faster
- Cleans up charge and release feel
- Improves crossbow consistency under ping
- Reduces delayed duplicate firing sounds
- Adds a minimal, focused HUD for weapon state
- Stays lightweight and client-side

## What It Improves

This mod handles important ranged-weapon feedback locally so actions feel cleaner the moment you use them.

For bows, charging and release feel more immediate and consistent.

For crossbows, charged-state feedback is cleaner and shot timing feels more stable under latency.

It also reduces the messy feeling caused by late duplicate firing sounds and gives you a compact HUD view for charge and shot state.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qeN_7OPdH3w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Important Notes

- Client-side only
- Works on Fabric `1.20.5 - 26.1x`
- Requires `Fabric API`
- Servers do not need to install the mod
- Does not add aim assist
- Does not aim, attack, or fire without your input
- Does not modify damage or projectile physics server-side

## Configuration

If [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is installed, you can configure:

- Mod `ON`/`OFF`
- HUD visibility

## Compatibility

- Minecraft `1.20.5 - 26.1x`
- Fabric
- Java `21+`
- Vanilla servers
- Modded servers

## Why Download It

If ranged combat feels sluggish or inconsistent on ping, Crossbow & Bow Optimizer makes bow and crossbow gameplay feel cleaner, tighter, and easier to read without changing server-side outcomes.
